case_title: ANTOINE BELL VS. JOSE BECERRA et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BELL, ANTOINE AS TO DEFENDANT BECERRA, JOSE BECERRA, JESUS BECERRA, CATALINA DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-24-2014 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-19-2014 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         DEC-01-2014
1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BELL, ANTOINE AS TO DEFENDANT BECERRA, JESUS BECERRA, CATALINA DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE BECERRA, ALVARAO

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-03-2015 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AS TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. THE DEC-24-2014 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST ANTOINE BELL FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: FEB-03-2015, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE FEB-20-2015. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR APR-07-2015 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-03-2015 CONTINUED TO APR-07-2015 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AS TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING APR-07-2015 AT 10:30 AM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. GOVERNMENT CODE 68608(B). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF BELL, ANTOINE

parties.name: BELL, ANTOINE 901 BAYSHORE BLVD. (307) SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94124

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-09-2015 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance nor objection. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter be dismissed pursuant to Gov. Code 68608 (b). The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk EBura; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-05-2015 Continued To Apr-07-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is reset to APR-07-2015 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk KCox; Proceedings not reported. (610)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-08-2014 Set For Order To Show Cause On Feb-03-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
